2.0 Violation Details

MEDIUM VIO-001 SBC Ref: 704:52-2.8.101

Mechanical protection for cables crossing construction site roads/walkways

Bounding box detected at region
Description Coiled electrical cables on floor near tool cart.
SBC Code 704:52-2.8.101 — Cables should not be run across site roads or walkways. Where necessary, special protection against mechanical damage shall be provided.
Priority MEDIUM
